narrative:
Goshen Township F (precinct in Clermont County) has 490 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.2 percentage points.
